name: SE1 — Southwark & Bankside
description: The cultural heart of South London. Home to Borough Market, Tate Modern, Shakespeare's Globe, and the South Bank.

name: EC1 — Clerkenwell & Shoreditch
description: Where historic London meets creative energy. Craft cocktail bars, design studios, and Exmouth Market.

name: WC2 — Covent Garden & Strand
description: Theatre district meets specialty coffee. Bustling piazzas, independent shops, and great people-watching.

name: NW3 — Hampstead
description: Village life in the city. Rolling heathland, swimming ponds, literary pubs, and panoramic skyline views.

name: W1 — Mayfair & Soho
description: London's playground. World-class restaurants, legendary music venues, and the best cocktail bars in the West End.

name: SW1 — Westminster & Pimlico
description: The seat of power. Westminster Abbey, Buckingham Palace, and hidden gems along the river.

name: E1 — Whitechapel & Spitalfields
description: East London's melting pot. Brick Lane, Spitalfields Market, street art, and the best curry in the city.

name: EC2 — Barbican & Moorgate
description: Brutalist architecture meets the City. The Barbican Centre, hidden gardens, and rooftop bars.
